description.ko: 음파가 결정 구조로 고체화되어 공허 속에서 빛과 기하학의 춤을 만들어내는 추상적인 시각화입니다.
description.en: An abstract visualization where sound waves solidify into crystalline structures, creating a dance of light and geometry in the void.

prompt: A cinematic 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Sonic Lattice.' A central vibrating geometric core generates complex #4169E1 royal blue frequency waves and #FF4500 electric orange ripples that solidify into floating crystalline lattices. The surrounding dark void is filled with #32CD32 green kinetic particles and #FFD700 gold light trails reacting to the invisible audio rhythm. Hyper-detailed ray tracing, intricate holographic UI elements, and fluid motion blur. 8k resolution, visualizing the physical architecture of sound.
